name: mozcloud
description: Claude Code plugins for Mozilla's MozCloud platform — Helm chart migrations, support analysis, and infrastructure tooling

plugins.name: mozcloud-helm
plugins.description: Helm chart migration toolkit for MozCloud — includes migration skill, autonomous migrator agent, and MCP server for helm ops, OCI registry checks, schema validation, and render diffs

plugins.name: mozcloud-support
plugins.description: MozCloud customer support skills — support analysis that cross-references Slack (#mozcloud-support) and Jira (SREIN) to categorize themes and produce actionable reports and SREIN triage skill
